title: Symptoms of Giardia infection (giardiasis) - Canada.ca
content:
## Symptoms of Giardia infection (giardiasis)
Learn  about the symptoms of Giardia infection (giardiasis) and what to do if you become ill.
- Symptoms of Giardia infection
- What to do if you become ill
- For more information

## Symptoms  of Giardia infection
The most common symptoms of Giardia infection include:
- stomach cramps  or pain
- nausea or  upset stomach
These symptoms usually appear 1  to 3 weeks after infection and usually last 2 to 6 weeks.
Some people may not show any symptoms of illness.

## What  to do if you become ill
Contact your health care  provider if you have any of these symptoms and think you have Giardia infection. Mention if you have been exposed to:
- an infected or potentially  infected animal, such as pets or livestock
- food, water or feces that may  have been contaminated by parasites
Your health care provider can:
- monitor your illness
- prescribe appropriate  treatment
If you have diarrhea, drink  plenty of water or fluids to prevent dehydration. Children and people with  weakened immune systems may experience more severe symptoms.
